title: Does Martin Shkreli Think C0VlD Was Man Made?
summary: A brief discussion about COVID-19 origins where Martin Shkreli shares his view that COVID was likely man-made, citing the proximity of the Wuhan wet market to the virology lab. The conversation touches on gain-of-function research and NIH funding concerns.

acronyms.definition: U.S. government agency that funds biomedical research, mentioned in context of potentially funding gain-of-function research

key_claims.claim: COVID-19 was likely man-made (95% base case probability)
The wet market where COVID originated was located next to a lab studying pandemic-related coronaviruses
Gain-of-function research doesn't make sense because we can't develop cures even during an actual pandemic
